title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 388.010 - Railroad corporation defined
text:
388.010.  Railroad corporation defined. — The term "railroad corporation" contained in this chapter shall be deemed and taken to mean all corporations, companies or individuals now owning or operating, or which may hereafter own or operate, any railroad in this state.
(RSMo 1939 § 5250) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 4812; 1919 § 10001; 1909 § 3214
